items.title: "Being good when you expect it is standard, and stressful.
items.body_excerpt:
"Being good when you expect it is standard, and stressful.

Being bad when you’re anticipating good is soul crushing.

Being bad when you could see it coming is an exercise in futility.

Only being good when you thought you’d be awful is fun."

Pieces like these are my favorite. Awesome read ⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️

The Phoenix Suns have tendered qualifying offers to Mark Williams and Koby Brea, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Williams and Brea will now be restricted free agents this offseason.

Williams' qualifying offer is for $9.6M. He reached starter criteria, which triggered a higher qualifying offer.

Brea's qualifying offer is for another two-way contract.
